channel.title: Nature
channel.description: Nature research articles and journal content.

item.title: News item should not enter the research queue
item.description: News content, not a Nature main-journal research article.
item.dc:creator: Nature News

item.title: C-glycoside synthesis via radical cross-coupling of glycohydrazides
item.description: This Nature research article reports a synthesis method, reaction framework, optimization constraints, mechanistic evidence, evaluation data, reproducible controls, and failure conditions that can improve research triage and interdisciplinary learning value.
item.dc:creator: A. Researcher
B. Scientist

item.title: Quantum light discovery through structured material response
item.description: This Nature research article describes quantum light experiments, material response variables, statistical measurements, benchmark evidence, limitations, and possible technology translation for careful scientific learning.
item.dc:creator: C. Physicist
